executive_summary: Harbour Workflow Co is losing around six hours a week to repetitive manual admin, including copying email enquiries into a spreadsheet and sending follow-ups by hand, which has also led to poor proposal visibility. The owner is ready for a phased approach, beginning with a simple CRM and automated reminders before exploring more advanced AI agents.

pain_points.title: Manual email-to-spreadsheet data entry
pain_points.description: New enquiries are manually copied from email into a spreadsheet every morning, creating a repetitive, error-prone start to the day.

pain_points.title: Hand-sent follow-up reminders
pain_points.description: Follow-up reminders are sent manually, increasing the risk of missed touchpoints and consuming valuable consulting time.

pain_points.title: Lost proposal status visibility
pain_points.description: Without a centralised pipeline, the team loses track of where each proposal stands, making forecasting and prioritisation difficult.

pain_points.title: High weekly admin overhead
pain_points.description: The combination of copying data, manual reminders, and spreadsheet management consumes approximately six hours per week.

quick_wins.title: Deploy a simple CRM with email capture
quick_wins.description: Connect the enquiry inbox to a lightweight CRM to auto-create contact and deal records, eliminating the morning spreadsheet routine.

quick_wins.title: Automate follow-up reminder workflows
quick_wins.description: Use the CRM's built-in automation to trigger reminder emails or tasks based on deal stage or last-contact date, removing manual follow-up work.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI email parsing agent
deeper_opportunities.description: Automatically extract key enquiry details from incoming emails and populate CRM fields before human review, further reducing manual data entry.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI proposal drafting assistant
deeper_opportunities.description: Generate first-draft proposals using CRM deal data and historical templates to accelerate turnaround times and improve win rates.

deeper_opportunities.title: Advanced pipeline analytics and reporting
deeper_opportunities.description: Implement automated dashboards to track proposal win rates, cycle times, and follow-up effectiveness for continuous process optimisation.

tool_recommendations.name: HubSpot CRM
tool_recommendations.purpose: Centralise enquiries, replace the spreadsheet, track proposal status, and automate follow-up reminders.

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Parse and route enquiry emails into the CRM if native inbox integration requires additional logic or formatting.

actions: Select and configure a lightweight CRM (e.g., HubSpot)
Connect the enquiry email inbox to auto-create records
Import existing spreadsheet data and map fields
Define proposal pipeline stages for clear status tracking
Build automated follow-up reminder workflows by deal stage
Set up deal ownership and task notifications
Train the team on the new pipeline process
Retire the manual spreadsheet and hand-sent reminders
Evaluate email parsing and AI drafting tools
Pilot one AI agent (e.g., proposal assistant or email parser)
Measure time savings and pipeline visibility improvements
Plan broader rollout based on pilot results
